evals.prompt: I need chain verification for example.com.
evals.expected_output: Use the chain-verifier skill for this chain verifier request and produce the documented result for example.com.
expectations: Selects chain-verifier for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_verify_chain.
Keeps the response focused on verifying that a certificate chain validates against the system trust store.

evals.prompt: Verify the full certificate chain for example.com and identify any missing or untrusted intermediates.
evals.expected_output: Use the chain-verifier skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects chain-verifier instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
